name: lib-canvas
title: Canvas vocabulary
description: Onda's placement + size vocabulary. `Placement` types (region or `{x,y,anchor}` 0..1 fractions, unclamped for off-canvas), `PlacementBox` wrapper, `SizeRole` typography roles (`'hero' | 'heading' | 'subheading' | 'body' | 'caption'`) that resolve to canvas-aware pixels, plus matching Zod schemas. Canvas-aware components depend on this.
